summary: Completed frontend testing of NexusBank Business Intelligence Dashboard. Successfully tested login functionality, executive dashboard, and basic navigation. Found critical authentication session persistence issue preventing comprehensive testing of all dashboard pages.

critical_bugs.issue: Authentication session is not persistent - user gets redirected back to login page after successful authentication
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents users from staying logged in and accessing dashboard features consistently

integration_issues.issue: Login works initially but session is lost, causing redirect to login page

passed_tests: Login page renders with NexusBank branding and Intelligence Platform subtitle
Login form contains all required elements (email, password, remember me, submit button)
SSO login button is present and functional
Login form accepts any email/password credentials
Successful redirect to dashboard after login
Executive Dashboard displays with correct title
All 6 KPI cards display with correct values ($12.8B, $8.4B, $124M, 28.4K, 892.0K, 2.3%)
All 4 expected charts render (Deposit Growth Trend, Loan Portfolio Trend, Revenue by Product, Region Performance)
Topbar with search, filters, and user menu is present
Export PDF button is present and clickable
Navigation to Deposits Dashboard works (when session is active)
Deposits Dashboard shows CASA/TD specific content and charts
Dark mode toggle is present in topbar
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication session persistence issue. The AuthContext or session management is not maintaining user authentication state, causing frequent redirects to login page. This prevents comprehensive testing and would severely impact user experience. Investigate AuthProvider, localStorage/sessionStorage usage, and protected route implementation.

success_percentage.frontend: 60% - Login and basic dashboard functionality works, but authentication persistence prevents full testing
success_percentage.navigation: 30% - Basic navigation works but session loss prevents comprehensive testing
success_percentage.ui_components: 85% - All visible UI components render correctly when accessible
